examples.title: Handling POST Request with Form Data
examples.description: Complete example of processing a POST request with proper encoding and form validation
examples.explanation: This code demonstrates: 1) Setting character encoding before reading parameters, 2) Form validation, 3) Session management for successful login, 4) Using forward for errors, 5) Using redirect (PRG pattern) for success.

examples.title: Returning JSON Response from Servlet
examples.description: Demonstrates setting proper headers and writing JSON content to response
examples.explanation: Key points: 1) Always set content type BEFORE getting writer, 2) Use application/json for JSON APIs, 3) Include character encoding for proper UTF-8 handling, 4) Can add CORS headers for cross-origin requests.

examples.title: Handling Multiple Values for Same Parameter
examples.description: Code demonstrating how to handle checkboxes or multi-select form elements
examples.explanation: This shows: 1) getParameterValues() for multi-select inputs, 2) getParameterNames() to iterate all parameters, 3) getParameterMap() for complete parameter collection, 4) Proper null checking when parameters may not exist.
